transcripts.notes: Daily engineering standup. Daniel (CTO) is running it. Discussion centered around the Atlas Mobile migration, the design system tokens, the rate-limiting middleware, the Drift reliability work and a few one-off asks.

Cross-functional decision meeting on European pricing strategy (project North Star Pricing). Marta (CEO) chairing. The team converged on a simplified two-tier uplift approach. Multiple downstream workstreams were assigned across product, sales, finance, marketing and people ops.
